hooks.command: f=$(jq -r ".tool_input.file_path // empty" 2>/dev/null || true); case "$f" in "${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR:-$PWD}/bin/"*) printf "{\"hookSpecificOutput\":{\"hookEventName\":\"PostToolUse\",\"additionalContext\":\"bin/ changed: dist/cli.js is a tracked build artifact. Run pnpm run cli:build and commit the regenerated dist/cli.js together with this change.\"}}" ;; esac
